assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E status --json returns connected=true with milestone info
assertionResults.title: returns connected=true with milestone info

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks list --json returns array of tasks with all statuses (API returns raw)
assertionResults.title: returns array of tasks with all statuses (API returns raw)

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks list --json returns only done tasks with --status done
assertionResults.title: returns only done tasks with --status done

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks show --json shows task by shortId (#1)
assertionResults.title: shows task by shortId (#1)

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks show --json shows task by fullId (TASK-2)
assertionResults.title: shows task by fullId (TASK-2)

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks show --json returns full task detail with all fields
assertionResults.title: returns full task detail with all fields

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks mine --json returns tasks for agent-alpha (seed data has TASK-4)
assertionResults.title: returns tasks for agent-alpha (seed data has TASK-4)

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks mine --json returns empty array for agent with no tasks
assertionResults.title: returns empty array for agent with no tasks

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E modules list --json lists all modules for the milestone
assertionResults.title: lists all modules for the milestone

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E modules show --json shows module detail by ID
assertionResults.title: shows module detail by ID

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks claim --json claims a todo task and returns updated status
assertionResults.title: claims a todo task and returns updated status

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks claim --json idempotent — same agent re-claiming succeeds
assertionResults.title: idempotent — same agent re-claiming succeeds

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks progress --json updates sub-task progress
assertionResults.title: updates sub-task progress

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks progress --json updates progress message
assertionResults.title: updates progress message

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks complete --json completes a claimed task with message and commit hash
assertionResults.title: completes a claimed task with message and commit hash

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks complete --json completes with --evidence and --files-touched
assertionResults.title: completes with --evidence and --files-touched

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks mine --json (after mutations) test-agent now has completed tasks visible
assertionResults.title: test-agent now has completed tasks visible

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks block --json blocks an in-progress task with reason
assertionResults.title: blocks an in-progress task with reason

assertionResults.fullName: mt-cli commands --json E2E tasks unblock --json unblocks a blocked task back to in-progress
assertionResults.title: unblocks a blocked task back to in-progress
